BṚH. S. 35,4 . caura˚ 69,27 . horā˚  BṚH. 1,19 .  KATHĀS. 25,46 . 36,44 . sattvadhana˚  PAÑCAT. 24,17 . tannagara˚  Z. d. d. m. G. 14,571,21 . seneva susvāminā ein guter Anführer  Spr. (II) 2617 .
— b〉 ein N. Kārttikeyaʼs  TRIK. 1,1,56 . 3,3,272 .  H. 208 .  H. an.   MED.   HALĀY. 1,19 .  JAṬĀDH. _in_ Verz. d. Oxf. H. 191,a,27 .  YĀJÑ. 1,293 . Viṣṇuʼs und Śivaʼs  ŚABDAR. _im_ ŚKDR.  Garuḍaʼs  ŚABDĀRTHAK. _bei_ WILSON .

— 2〉 f. ˚nī Herrin, Gebieterin  MBH. 4,423 .  KATHĀS. 12,85 . gṛhe 29,72 . prāṇeṣu, dhaneṣu 52,315 . yuṣmat˚ 26,42 . 81,56 .

results.rendered_html:
svāmin a. (nī f.) [sva-astyarthe mini dīrghaḥ] Possessing proprietory rights.
— m.
1 A proprietor, an owner.
2 A lord, master; raghusvāminaḥ saccaritraṃ  Vikr. 18. 107. 
3 A sovereign, king, monarch.
4 A husband.
5 A spiritual preceptor.
6 A learned Brāhmaṇa, an ascetic or religious man of the highest order; (in this sense usually added to proper names).
7 An epithet of Kārtikeya.
8 Of Viṣṇu.
9 Of Śiva.
10 Of the sage Vātsyāyana.
11 Of Garuḍa.
Comp.
— upakārakaḥ a horse.
— kāryaṃ the business of a king or master.
— jaṃghin m. N. of Paraśurāma.
— pāla m. du. the owner and the keeper (of cattle);  Ms. 8. 5. 
— bhāvaḥ the state of a lord or owner, ownership.
— mūla a. originating in or derived from a
(pb) master or lord.
— vātsalyaṃ affection for the husband or lord.
— sadbhāvaḥ
1 existence of a master or owner.
2 goodness of a master or lord.
— sevā
1 the service of a master.
2 respect for a husband.
